items.title: Hearts sign Mendy for potential Forest Green record fee
items.summary: Forest Green Rovers sell midfielder Laurent Mendy to Heart of Midlothian for what the National League outfit say could be a club record fee of nearly £1m "if all targets are met".

items.title: ‘Try new experience’ – Man Utd left wing target, 27, who starred at World Cup admits he wants summer transfer move
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED target Rafael Leao has reportedly told AC Milan he wants to leave the club this summer. items.title: Liverpool takeover Q&A: Could Bezos buy stake at Anfield?
items.summary: Liverpool's owners Fenway Sports Group are in talks with a consortium fronted by Amit Bhatia over the sale of a minority stake in the club.

items.title: Premier League club forced to cancel pre-season training camp as world leaders flying in for G7 summit wreck pitches
items.summary: BRIGHTON were forced to cancel their pre-season training camp in France after world leaders flying into the G7 summit wrecked their pitches. items.title: Devlin: Rangers wait was 'too stressful'
items.summary: Cammy Devlin revealed the stress he felt at the 2026 World Cup as he looked to make his move to Rangers.

items.title: IOC says Infantino complaint outside its scope
items.summary: The IOC says it will not investigate Gianni Infantino as a complaint about the Fifa president is "outside" its scope.

items.title: Scottish sides in Europe postpone league matches
items.summary: All five Scottish teams in European competitions have opted to postpone their Premiership matches scheduled for Saturday, 22 August.
